title: Oscars 2026: The best jokes from Conan O’Brien’s monologue
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Conan O'Brien hosted the 2026 Oscars, delivering jokes about Netflix and himself, at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles.
O'Brien's monologue included visual gags, such as fake ads and a parody of future Oscars on YouTube.
Guest Jimmy Kimmel contributed politically charged humor during his presentation of documentary categories.

title: Fundraiser: Community remembers Danvers mother, nurse killed in her home
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Janet Swallow, 68, a nurse from Danvers, was allegedly killed by 18-year-old Anthony DeMayo during a home invasion.
A GoFundMe campaign has raised nearly $50,000 to support Swallow's family, with a goal of $65,000.
DeMayo was apprehended in Lynn and is facing murder charges; he reportedly planned the attack for some time.

title: Northeastern women’s hockey advances to Frozen Four after defeating Minnesota
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Northeastern women's hockey advanced to the Frozen Four after defeating Minnesota 4-2 in the NCAA Quarterfinals.
Sophomore goalie Lisa Jönsson made 45 saves, while four Huskies players scored in the victory at Ridder Arena.
Northeastern will face No. 1 Ohio State in the Frozen Four on March 20 at Pegula Ice Arena, Penn State.

title: Bomb threat reportedly halts plane at Logan ‘for hours’ before being deemed ‘not credible’
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: A bomb threat caused a JetBlue flight to delay at Boston Logan Airport for several hours on Saturday.
Authorities, including FBI agents and bomb-sniffing dogs, found the bomb threat to be not credible.
No arrests have been made, and an investigation into the bomb threat hoax is ongoing, according to State Police.

title: 17 arrested during St. Patrick’s Day parade in South Boston, police say
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Seventeen people were arrested during the St. Patrick's Day parade in South Boston, according to police reports.
The MBTA and Transit Police confiscated numerous gallons of alcoholic drinks to combat public drinking at the event.
Residents reported issues to 311, including underage drinking, public indecency, and large parties during the parade.

title: 2026 Oscars: Full list of winners (updating live)
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: 'One Battle After Another' wins Best Picture at the 2026 Oscars, securing six awards including Best Director and Best Adapted Screenplay.
Michael B. Jordan wins Best Actor for 'Sinners', which also receives awards for Best Original Screenplay, Best Cinematography, and Best Score.
'KPop Demon Hunters' wins Best Animated Feature, while 'Frankenstein' takes home awards for Best Production Design, Costume Design, and Makeup and Hairstyling.

title: Oscars red carpet: See the best Academy Awards fashion
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Hollywood celebrities showcased top fashion at the 2026 Oscars red carpet at Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles.
Conan O'Brien hosted the Oscars for the second year while attending with his wife Liza Powel O'Brien.
Stars like Kate Hudson, Timothee Chalamet, and Elle Fanning walked the red carpet before the ceremony.

title: All the way from Indonesia, she’s running the Boston Marathon for people with visual impairments
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Fransisca Miraningtyas from Jakarta, Indonesia, is running the 2026 Boston Marathon to support people with visual impairments.
Miraningtyas, diagnosed with pterygium, aims to raise awareness for eye care and the need for affordable vision-restoring treatments.
She believes each mile can help inspire action and provide hope for those needing access to eye surgery.

title: 5 takeaways from the Revolution’s 6-1 dismantling of FC Cincinnati
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: New England Revolution tied a club record by scoring six goals in a 6-1 win over FC Cincinnati.
Brayan Ceballos scored twice from corner kick headers, helping showcase the Revolution's set piece success.
Diego Fagundez returned to the Revolution, contributing a secondary assist in his first game back with the team.

title: Man dies after kayak overturns off Cape Cod
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: A 22-year-old man died after his kayak overturned in Wellfleet, Cape Cod, on Saturday evening.
Emergency crews, including local harbormasters and the Coast Guard, conducted a search using boats, a helicopter, and drones.
The man was found in critical condition nearly two hours later and died at Cape Cod Hospital; his identity is withheld.
